title: OpenClaw Operations Runbook
content: Primary escalation and recovery process for Mission Control operators. Includes checkpoint cadence, incident ownership, and rollback policies.

title: Memory Structuring Standard
content: Defines required metadata for daily memory artifacts, expected retention windows, and sync responsibilities for Carl outputs.

title: Proactive Task Authoring
content: How Carl should generate proactive work items, including naming conventions, SLA defaults, and assignment heuristics.
